addons: For models with add-on models, write the add-on model name here, like an international model Also named a China Only S. and for models based on a base model, write the base model name here. For example, Ps is based on T, W5 is based on T5, Chromebook is based on Windows model, X1 Extreme/T1g is based on P1,T15/16g is based on P15/16,T15p is based on P15v, etc. Don't write:X/L/11e Yoga based on X/L/11e, Ts Based on X, T/L16 Based on T/L14,
//: If this model has add-on model, write the nickname info and addon model code, otherwise don't write anything, including while you meet a model based on another.
processor_options: rename the CPU name to simplest form, and create model json files in CPU folder.
display_options: Using LEN Code, and create model json files in Display folder.
dock_support: Only write Proprietary Docking Port (Also included OneLink, OneLink+ and CS18 Docking Port， DON'T write USB/USB-C/Thunderbolt dock here) here if the model has it, otherwise write None, and create model json files in Dock folder.
Ethernet: rename the Ethernet name to simplest form, and create model json files in Ethernet folder.
WLAN: rename the WLAN Card name to simplest form, and create model json files in WLAN folder.
WWAN: rename the WWAN name to simplest form, and create model json files in WWAN folder.

max_resolution.dp: Debug (For DP, Mini DP and Thunderbolt 1/2, Write Here)
max_resolution.usb_c_tbt: Debug (For USB-C and Thunderbolt 3, Write Here)
